title: Chat Frontend Base & Common Infrastructure

classes.name: AgentChatMixin
methods: send_done(self, chat_id, raw_text, **ctx) -> None  [calls build_done_text + send_text]
run_agent(self, chat_id, text, **ctx) -> None  [async task loop, polls agent.put_task() dequeue]

classes.name: QQApp
key_methods: send_text(self, chat_id, content, *, msg_id=None, is_group=False) -> None
on_message(self, data, is_group=False) -> None  [entry point from QQ platform]

classes.name: WeComApp
key_methods: on_message(...) -> None  [entry point from WeCom webhook]

classes.name: DingTalkApp
key_methods: send_text(self, chat_id, content) -> None  [calls split_text + platform API]
on_message(self, content, sender_id, sender_name, conversation_type=None, conversation_id=None) -> None

text_processing: clean_reply(text) -> str  — strips XML-like tags, collapses blank lines
split_text(text, limit) -> list[str]  — word-wrap splitter for platform limits
build_done_text(raw_text) -> str  — cleans reply + appends file paths
restore_history: _restore_native_history(content) -> list[str]  — parse native JSON prompt/response log
format_restore() -> tuple[info, err]  — top-level restore entry
runtime_helpers: ensure_single_instance(port, label) -> socket  — binds lock socket or sys.exit
require_runtime(agent, label, **required) -> None  — validates keys + llmclient
redirect_log(script_file, log_name, label, allowed) -> None  — redirects stdout/stderr to file

key_relationships: AgentChatMixin uses user_tasks: dict as task state registry
AgentChatMixin calls agent.put_task() to enqueue work
AgentChatMixin calls agent.abort(), agent.history, agent.is_running, agent.llmclient, agent.llm_no, agent.get_llm_name(), agent.next_llm(), agent.list_llms()
run_agent() delegates to send_text() and send_done()
run_agent_flow: 5. If Q.Empty and ping_interval exceeded: send '⏳ 还在处理中' ping
important_notes: send_text() is abstract — subclasses MUST implement it
user_tasks is a shared dict keyed by chat_id, value is {running: bool}
FILE_HINT constant prepended to every user message sent to agent
split_limit is platform-specific (QQ=1500, WeCom=1200, DingTalk=1800, base=1500)
ping_interval=20s between heartbeat messages during long tasks
Restore feature reads temp/model_responses_*.txt log files
